hero.headline: Expert Auto Mechanic Services in Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our certified technicians deliver quality workmanship and honest pricing.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Auto Repair You Can Rely On
featureSections.body: At Buckner Auto Repair, we handle everything from check engine lights to complete overhauls. Our ASE-certified technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to get you back on the road safely.
featureSections.cardBody: We provide detailed estimates and explain every repair. No hidden fees, no unnecessary work.

featureSections.title: Your Satisfaction Is Our Priority
featureSections.body: We treat every car as if it were our own. Our team takes the time to answer your questions and ensure you understand the work needed.
featureSections.cardBody: All repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction Guarantee

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Repair?

servicesPage.intro: Buckner Auto Repair offers a full range of auto repair services in Dallas, TX. From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, our certified technicians have you covered. We use high-quality parts and provide transparent pricing on every job.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair to restore performance.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint issues quickly and accurately. Whether it's a check engine light, rough idle, or loss of power, we have the expertise to fix it right the first time.
benefits: Restore engine performance and fuel efficiency
Extend the life of your vehicle
Prevent costly breakdowns with early detection
Warranty on all parts and labor

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and assess performance.

process.title: Detailed Explanation
process.description: Our technician explains the issue, shows you the data, and provides a clear estimate.

process.title: Quality Repair
process.description: We perform the repair using OEM or equivalent parts and test drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour. Complex issues may require additional time for thorough inspection.

faqs.question: Do you service all car makes and models?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work on all domestic and import vehicles. Our technicians are trained on a wide range of systems.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Keep your brakes in top condition for safety and peace of mind.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are critical for safety. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to ensure optimal stopping power. From squeaky brakes to complete brake system overhauls, we do it all.
benefits: Free brake inspection with any service

process.title: Thorough Inspection
process.description: We check brake pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid level.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We provide a detailed report of brake condition and recommend necessary repairs.

process.title: Precision Service
process.description: We replace worn components with high-quality parts and test the brakes for proper function.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles depending on driving habits. We inspect them at every visit.

faqs.question: What causes brake noise?
faqs.answer: Worn pads, glazed rotors, or debris can cause noise. We'll diagnose and fix the issue.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable year-round with expert climate control service.
services.longDescription: When your AC blows warm or the heater fails, we can help. We service all components including compressor, condenser, evaporator, and heater core. We also recharge refrigerant and fix leaks.
benefits: Improve air quality with proper filtration

process.title: System Diagnosis
process.description: We test pressure, temperature, and inspect components for leaks or damage.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We explain the issue and provide options for repair or replacement.

process.title: Service & Test
process.description: We perform the repair, recharge the system, and verify proper operation.

faqs.question: Why is my AC not blowing cold air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a clogged condenser. We'll diagnose the exact problem.

faqs.question: Do you repair heater issues?
faqs.answer: Yes, we handle heater core, blower motor, thermostat, and other heating system repairs.

services.title: Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your car running smoothly with regular maintenance.
services.longDescription: Preventive maintenance is key to vehicle longevity. We offer oil changes, fluid flushes, tire rotations, belt replacements, and more. Follow your manufacturer's schedule with our help.

process.title: Vehicle Check
process.description: We review your service history and manufacturer recommendations.

process.title: Service Performance
process.description: We perform the required maintenance using quality fluids and parts.

process.title: Final Inspection
process.description: We check fluid levels, belts, hoses, and provide a report on vehicle condition.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need oil changes every 5,000-7,500 miles. We recommend following your owner's manual.

faqs.question: What does a tune-up include?
faqs.answer: Typically spark plugs, filters, fluid checks, and a general inspection. We customize based on your vehicle.

about.headline: About Buckner Auto Repair
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep Dallas drivers safe and satisfied.
story: Buckner Auto Repair was founded on the belief that car owners deserve transparent service and expert workmanship. Our team brings over 20 years of combined experience, serving the Dallas community with pride. We invest in the latest diagnostic technology and continuous training to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs.

Every vehicle that enters our shop is treated with care and respect. We take the time to educate our customers, so they feel confident in the decisions they make. Our commitment to quality and integrity has made us a trusted name in Dallas auto repair.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs and why. No upselling, no shortcuts.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use high-quality parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every repair.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We listen, explain, and deliver.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We stay updated with the latest automotive technology and training to serve you better.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Buckner Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your auto repair needs. Call or visit us today.
